steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
We're given $p(n) = 5n^3$ and need $p(n) = 135$. Set the function equal to 135:
$$5n^3 = 135$$

steps.title: Solve for n
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 5:
$$n^3 = 27$$
Take the cube root of both sides:
$$n = \sqrt[3]{27} = 3$$
That matches Choice A — $3$.
